meta.title: Cigar Shop. The Art of Patience
meta.description: Cigar Shop, premium destination for cigars, whisky and the ritual of patience. 9 stores across Belgrade.

hero.tagline: A premium retail chain of the finest cigar brands, quality accessories and premium spirits.

manifest.title: The art of patience.
manifest.lead: Cigar Shop is a premium retail chain of the finest cigar brands, quality accessories and premium spirits.
manifest.body: Nine stores across Belgrade. Over 500 cigars from seven countries and more than 260 selected bottles across eight categories. Cigars from Cuba, the Dominican Republic, Nicaragua, Honduras, Costa Rica, Mexico and Italy stand beside Scotch, Irish, Japanese and Oriental whiskies, bourbon, cognac, gin, rum, vodka, domestic rakija and wine. Alongside them, the tools that complete the ritual: cutters, lighters, humidors, ashtrays and travel cases.

brands.title: From field to humidor.
brands.lead: Over 70 brands from seven countries. Each is the seal of a region, a dynasty and decades of patience. Choose a region, discover the story.

gallery.title: The ritual, framed.
gallery.lead: Boxes, crowns, embers, the humidor, moments words cannot describe.

origins.title: From field to humidor.
origins.lead: Over 70 brands from seven countries. Pick a region on the globe or in the tabs, discover the story of tobacco and brands.

cuba.name: Cuba
cuba.desc: Vuelta Abajo, the mother of all tobaccos. Iron-rich earth, unforgiving sun, rolling that takes decades to master.

dominican.name: Dominican
dominican.desc: Cibao Valley. The balance that defines Fuente and Davidoff Dominicans: creamy, subtly sweet, diplomatic.

nicaragua.name: Nicaragua
nicaragua.desc: Estelí and Jalapa. Volcanic soil grows tobacco with darkness, peppery, earthy, masculine.

honduras.name: Honduras
honduras.desc: Jamastran and Copán. Warm, nutty profile with hints of leather and baked bread.

costa.name: Costa Rica
costa.desc: Turrialba. Gentle, mineral notes, the perfect morning cigar with espresso.

mexico.name: Mexico
mexico.desc: San Andrés Negro. Relaxed, bittersweet, an ideal wrapper for complex blends.

items.title: Julius Caesar
items.sub: J. C. Newman, Diamond Crown Florida Sun Grown

items.title: Montecristo · Partagas · Cohiba
items.sub: The trio at the heart of Cuban tradition.

humidor.title: Step into the humidor.
humidor.lead: The cigar that waits for you here has spent years in silence, now it waits for smoke.
humidor.body: Every humidor we run is a promise to the buyer. 70% humidity, a constant 20°C, refrigerated Spanish cedar that smells as it should. The Cohiba you take home today felt exactly the same in the roller's hands ten years ago. That is the only difference between a cigar and a cigar worth smoking.

spirits.title: Liquid companions of smoke.
spirits.lead: Over 260 selected bottles across eight categories. Every pairing with a cigar has its own rhythm, dialect, and temperature.

items.title: Single Malt Scotch
items.sub: Macallan, Lagavulin, Glenfiddich, Talisker. Peated Islay beside a full Habanos; fruity Speyside beside a creamy Dominican.

items.title: Japanese Whisky
items.sub: Yamazaki, Hakushu, Nikka, Yoichi. Zen precision, floral and light, the perfect companion to a morning cigar.

items.title: Irish Pot Still
items.sub: Redbreast, Green Spot, Jameson. Triple-distilled softness, a fruit canopy above the ember.

items.title: Bourbon & Rye
items.sub: Buffalo Trace, Woodford Reserve, Maker's Mark. Kentucky caramel, white oak, the black pepper of rye.

items.title: Cognac & Armagnac
items.sub: Hennessy XO, Remy Martin, Armenian Ararat. Grape distilled through decades, the pairing that tames the fullest cigars.

items.title: Premium Rakija
items.sub: Zaričje, Zariće, Prokupac. 28 local distilleries, gold and silver medals, the authentic note of these lands.

ritual.title: Cut. Light. Savor.
ritual.step1Body: A sharp, clean cut, 2 mm above the cap.
ritual.step2Body: Cedar match or scentless butane flame.
ritual.step3Body: One draw per minute. Don't rush, the ember hates hurry.

locations.title: Nine addresses across Belgrade.
locations.lead: Click an ember-point for hours, photo, and directions.

contact.title: Write us.
contact.lead: For private tastings, corporate gifts, or simply a conversation over a cigar.
contact.success: Message sent. You'll hear back within the day.
